# redpanda_resource_group (Data Source)

Data source for a Redpanda Cloud resource group

## Usage

### Search by ID

```hcl
data "redpanda_resource_group" "example" {
    id = "resource_group_id"
}
```

### Search by name

```hcl
data "redpanda_resource_group" "example" {
    name = "default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) ID of the resource group. ID is an output of the Create Resource Group request and cannot be set by the caller
- `name` (String) The unique name of the resource group.
